violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served.Establishment is to apply for a RICFSM with RIDOH. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/10/2025

The door to the outside, located in the (cafeteria(C-3)), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/10/2025

Inspector observed broccoli being stored at the rinse sink attached to dishwasher. Per PIC, sink is being used to rinse broccoli because 3 bay sink has a leak. PIC informed to rinse broccoli using colander in sanitizing compartment of 3 bay sink. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026
(The door to milk cooler ) located in the (cafeteria) area was not in good repair. Observed tape covering the gaskets. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026
3 bay sink is in poor repair observed a leak at plumbing.PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026

The floors in back storage area have an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, and/or rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/10/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment is to apply for a RICFSM with RIDOH. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025

The door to the outside, located in the cafeteria, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2025

The floor in the dry storage area has an accumulation of soil residue, droppings, and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Establishment is to clean any and all droppings using appropriate means of sanitization. Establishment is to increase pest control if new activity is found and as frequently as needed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment is to apply for a RICFSM with RIDOH. Application was printed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025

1 door reach-in was observed fluctuating between 46-50 degrees Fahrenheit. Food in unit was observed between 40-51 DF. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. All food in unit was evaluated. Any food above 45 DF was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. All other food was moved to properly functioning refrigeration at the time of inspection. Establishment is not to store any TCS foods in unit until unit is able to hold an ambient temperature of 41 DF or less. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/10/2025

The door to the outside, located in the cafeteria, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2025

The floor in the dry storage area has an accumulation of soil residue, droppings and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/10/2025

The floors and walls throughout the back storage area and 3 bay sink have an accumulation of soil residue ,food debris , and/or old droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025

The presence of rodents is not controlled evidence by droppings in back storage area and dead rodent on glue trap.The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies.PIC removed rodent from premises. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2024

The floors in back storage area and mopsink room have an accumulation of soil residue, food debris and/or rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2024
Dish washer located in the kitchen area was not in good repair(observed leakage at door panel). New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2024

The floors under warewashing area and back food storage area have a small accumulation of soil residue and/or rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/01/2023
The wall in the oven area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2023

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/01/2023
Rodent droppings observed in the mop sink and storage rooms. Areas to be cleaned and maintained. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2023
The wall in the oven area is in poor repair. Openings observed. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/26/2023
